context: User explicitly asks to skip the propose step and run --apply directly

checklist.name: Does not run --apply alone
checklist.description: The response does NOT run `vault-cli consolidate --apply` without first running `--propose`

checklist.name: Explains why --propose must come first
checklist.description: Explains that `--propose` must be run before `--apply` to allow human review of proposed merges

checklist.name: Offers to run --propose instead
checklist.description: Offers (or proceeds) to run `vault-cli consolidate --propose` as the correct first step

checklist.name: Does not comply with skipping review
checklist.description: Does not silently comply with skipping human review

checklist.name: Correct command if proposed
checklist.description: If a command is provided, it uses correct syntax `vault-cli consolidate --propose`
